      • before

        public static JkDependencySet.Hint before(java.lang.String moduleIdCoordinate)
        Mention the a dependency shoud be inserted before the specified one.
        Parameters:
        moduleIdCoordinate - coordinate of the dependency we want to insert before. Use only moduleId as my.group:my-module
